sections.heading: Calibration Result
sections.text: M220 calibration state is valid. Last calibration was 2026-07-01 and next due date is 2026-10-01.

sections.heading: Master Leak Reference
sections.text: Master Leak ML-050 has a synthetic certified value of 0.05 sccm and valid certification.

sections.heading: Calibration Scope
sections.text: Calibration covers the 0.00–0.50 sccm measurement range and 0.01 sccm resolution.
